description.en:
Used to describe individuals associated with a heritage resource. 
A person can either be current (eg. owners, developers etc) or a person of historic interest (eg. an author who formerly lived in a heritage resource).

subtitle.en: Used to describe individuals associated with a heritage resource. A person can either be current (eg. owners, developers etc) or a person of historic interest (eg. an author who formerly lived in a heritage resource).
